sacnLocalAddress: Local Address to bind for sACN
installModalContent:
No installation of rkbx_link was found. 
Would you like to download the latest version?
updateModalContent: A new version of rkbx_link is available!
updateRate/tooltip: How often to fetch song position per second
slowUpdateEveryNth/tooltip: Perform a slow update every n-th Update
keepWarm/tooltip: Keep track of non-master decks. Uses more CPU, but ensures SIGNIFICANTLY smoother transitions between decks
activeDecks/tooltip: Number of active decks to track
cumulativeErrorTolerance/tooltip: Cumulative time error before forcing a correction
masterBeatSubdivision/tooltip: The beat subdivision to send for the master deck. E.g. 0.25 will send a message every beat, 1 every bar, etc.
masterBeatTrigger/tooltip: The beat trigger to send for the master deck. E.g. 0.25 will send a message every beat, 1 every bar, etc.
nonMasterBeatSubdivision/tooltip: The beat subdivision to send for non-master decks. E.g. 0.25 will send a message every beat, 1 every bar, etc.
nonMasterBeatTrigger/tooltip: The beat trigger to send for non-master decks. E.g. 0.25 will send a message every beat, 1 every bar, etc.
versionWarningModalContent:
After registering rkbx_link, you will first need to start it manually
to download the offsets.
This will be fixed with rkbx_link v. 1.2.1
